selected.title: HTTP client/proxy migration for uploads and login plus reqwest ratchet
selected.reason: Concrete workflow/infrastructure change: proxy/custom-CA behavior and auth redaction boundaries affect enterprise Codex use; grouped because these PRs are one migration stack. New relative to recent reports, which covered WebSocket proxy but not uploads/login/deny ratchet.

selected.title: Code Mode host installation on Darwin and fallback when host binary is missing
selected.reason: User-visible Code Mode reliability issue for macOS installs and distributions lacking the companion binary; follows 2026-07-08 alpha asset note with concrete install/runtime fixes.

selected.title: Codex Apps filters optional file fields by tool schema
selected.reason: Concrete MCP/Codex Apps interoperability fix: strict file schemas no longer reject undeclared optional fields.

selected.title: Bundled OpenAI Docs skill updated for GPT-5.6
selected.reason: Directly relevant to Codex skill behavior and new model migration guidance; new source-level fact beyond prior GPT-5.6 UI/release signals.

selected.title: Image generation defaults to extension-backed implementation
selected.reason: Concrete default-path change for Codex image generation/tool hosting; useful for users relying on image tools or feature flags.

notes: Read input.md, context.json, and 2026-07-09/2026-07-08 history before selection. Did not use selected_items.json as primary input. Output is Chinese-first reader-facing markdown; recent report dedupe kept only new facts or follow-ups with changed details.
